news.headline: Mali pays tribute to Defence Minister Sadio Camara
news.summary: In tonight's programme, Mali pays tribute to Defence Minister Sadio Camara killed last weekend. Also, Sabastian Sawe gets a hero's welcome in Kenya after making history in the London Marathon. And the world gets a fresh look at Winnie Mandela in a new Netflix documentary.

news.headline: How is Israel replicating its Gaza tactics in Lebanon?
news.summary: Widespread Israeli attacks on civilian targets in Lebanon are a repeated tactic from Gaza.

news.headline: Trump says Iran can play at World Cup in US after FIFA confirmation
news.summary: FIFA chief Gianni Infantino has said Iran will play their World Cup matches, leading to agreement from US President.
